productDisplayName: Fila Men DLS Temporal Grey Sports Shoes
description: fila fan boys will surely love this aggressive sport shoe from the Italian brand, with its mesh upper, cushiony midsole and comfy padded inner. The DLS Temporal is desgined to keep your feet cushioned and comfy, regardless of the terrain. This shoe is great for a morning jog or a weekend game! Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays Padded tongue Mesh inner Central lace ups Padded footbed Stiff support for the back foot Midsole Thick foam rubber midsole with an injected air unit at the heel and a V3 Dynamic Landing System Outsole TPU outsole with rubber inlays Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
